case_title: MOUTON, SHARON VS LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOUTON, SHARON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP $1,505.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,555.00, PLAINTIFF IS IN POSSESSION OF AN UNCASHED CHECK FOR DEFENDANT FOR $1550.27 WHICH SHE MAY CASH STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
